description: Style NoteInspired from India's rich jewel history, this pair of earrings from royal diadem is sure to become a love-forever statement piece in your jewellery box. Style this with matching ethnic suits or saris or wear it with a monochrome ensemble for an interesting fusion vibe. This piece is guaranteed to give your look an instant boho edge (if it's a Western outfit) or a refined polish (if paired with ethnic wear)Product Details Circular base with green and red stones at the periphery and pearl stones at the middle with a red centre stoneHas a umbrella shaped dangler encrusted with green and red stones and a pearl beadHas a earring post and back closureMaterial and CareMetalWipe with a cotton swab to remove dustSizeLength: 4.5 cm
